Project ShadowGrid core architecture initialization. Initial database infrastructure deployed using standard PostgreSQL schemas. Core engineering contact assigned: Agent Alexander.
System update for ShadowGrid: Algorithmic development introduces Concept Vector-Embeddings to optimize indexing operations on top of the PostgreSQL tables.
Internal memo: Project ShadowGrid engineering overhead reassignment. Agent Alexander is officially removed from primary operations. Lead engineer status transferred to Agent Bianca.
Architecture migration proposal: Due to severe scaling limits with relational schemas, ShadowGrid has initiated a full database migration from PostgreSQL to Asset Qdrant.

Decommissioning report: Project ShadowGrid has completely shut down the PostgreSQL engine. The system is now operating exclusively on the active Qdrant database stack. Agent Bianca confirmed a scheduled verification run (Verification-Run-1).
